data.name: swagger_summary_multidatacodeconverter_convert
data.value: Implement custom conversions on system multi-data codes.

data.name: swagger_remarks_multidatacodeconverter_convert
data.value:
Description:
Implement custom conversions on system multi-data codes. The AI ​​values ​​sent as part of the request are formatted as they appear in the multi-data code read by the system. Returns a list with the conversion of the values ​​associated with each of the AIs sent as part of the request.

data.name: swagger_response_200_multidatacodeconverter_convert
data.value: Successful operation.

data.name: swagger_response_400_multidatacodeconverter_convert
data.value: Validation error.

data.name: supported_languages
data.value: Supported languages

data.name: swagger_description
data.value: Documentation of multi-data code conversion for the WMS system

data.name: swagger_summary_problemdetails_detail
data.value: Detail

data.name: swagger_summary_problemdetails_instance
data.value: Instance

data.name: swagger_summary_problemdetails_status
data.value: Status

data.name: swagger_summary_problemdetails_title
data.value: Title

data.name: swagger_summary_problemdetails_type
data.value: Type

data.name: swagger_tag_multidatacodeconverter
data.value: Custom conversion of system multi-data codes

data.name: swagger_summary_multidatacodeconversionrequest_application
data.value: Código do aplicativo onde o código multidados é inserido

data.name: swagger_summary_multidatacodeconversionrequest_multidatacodetype
data.value: Type of multi-data code read by the system

data.name: swagger_summary_multidatacodeconversionrequest_multidatacode
data.value: Multi-data code read by the system

data.name: swagger_summary_mutidatacodeconversionairequest_value
data.value: AI value obtained from the multi-data code read by the system

data.name: swagger_summary_mutidatacodeconversionairequest_ai
data.value: AI code obtained from the multi-data code read by the system

data.name: swagger_summary_mutidatacodeconversioncontextkeyvaluepairrequest_value
data.value: Value associated with the context key prior to reading the multi-data code. Dates and decimal numbers must be serialized in invariant culture.

data.name: swagger_summary_mutidatacodeconversioncontextkeyvaluepairrequest_key
data.value: Context key prior to reading the multi-data code

data.name: swagger_summary_multidatacodeconversionairesponse_value
data.value: AI value obtained from the conversion carried out on the value obtained from the multi-data code read by the system

data.name: swagger_summary_multidatacodeconversionairesponse_ai
data.value: AI code obtained from the multi-data code read by the system

data.name: swagger_summary_multidatacodeconversionresponse_error
data.value: If the specified multidata code does not satisfy custom validations, this field indicates the associated error message.
